Appearances:
Saul Ferster for Plaintiff Duboce 100 LLC is present. Represented by Ed Hauer
Defendant, Susan Beck, is present.
Attorney, Ali Fariters, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of DEC-07-2009 is vacated.
